briefdescription.para: This function encrypts the data with provided AES key and IV and decrypts the encrypted data also checks whether GCM tag is matched or not and finally compares the decrypted data with the original data provided.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if the Aes example was failed.
XST_SUCCESS if the Aes example was successful

detaileddescription.para: Converts the string into the equivalent Hex buffer. Ex: "abc123" -> {Buf[2] = 0x23, Buf[1] = 0xc1, Buf[0] = 0xab}

parameterdescription.para: is a Input String. Will support the lower and upper case values. Value should be between 0-9, a-f and A-F
of the input string. Should have even values

listitem.para: ERROR when input parameters are not valid
an error when input buffer has invalid values
